objective: Dynamic Claude Code env-var injection via launchctl setenv/unsetenv on ocx start/stop with crash-safety and config toggle

workPhases.title: Core: launchctl env inject/revert module + server lifecycle hooks

tasks.title: Wire inject into server startup (src/server/index.ts or proxy start)
Add stale-detection on startup (health-check dead port, then unsetenv)
Add claudeCode.systemEnv to OcxConfig types + schema
Honor the toggle in inject/revert calls
ocx start/stop CLI handles the new lifecycle
Integration test: config toggle off skips injection

criteria.scenario: ocx start sets 3 env vars via launchctl; new terminal inherits them
criteria.expectedEvidence: launchctl getenv output shows correct values
criteria.capturedEvidence: Committed 646aa07: injectSystemEnv(port,config) calls launchctl setenv for ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, _CLAUDE_CODE_ASSUME_FIRST_PARTY_BASE_URL, CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_GATEWAY_MODEL_DISCOVERY. Wired in src/cli/index.ts after signal handler registration. Tests verify correct launchctl commands (tests/system-env.test.ts, 9 pass).

criteria.scenario: ocx stop or Ctrl+C unsets all 3 via launchctl unsetenv
criteria.expectedEvidence: launchctl getenv returns empty after stop
criteria.capturedEvidence: revertSystemEnv() calls launchctl unsetenv for all injectedKeys. Wired in syncCleanup (daemon shutdown), handleStop (CLI stop), handleUninstall. Ownership-checked: only unsets if ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL matches our port. Test: 'revertSystemEnv unsets owned variables and deletes the tracking file'.

criteria.scenario: Crash recovery: stale env pointing at dead port is cleaned on start
criteria.expectedEvidence: Test mock or manual: stale value detected and removed
criteria.capturedEvidence: cleanStaleSystemEnv() reads tracking file, health-checks the tracked port via fetch(/healthz, 1s timeout), and if dead calls revertSystemEnv(). Called at the start of injectSystemEnv. Test: 'cleanStaleSystemEnv reverts a dead tracked proxy'.

criteria.scenario: Config toggle claudeCode.systemEnv controls injection behavior
criteria.expectedEvidence: When false, no launchctl calls made
criteria.capturedEvidence: OcxClaudeCodeConfig.systemEnv field added to src/types.ts. injectSystemEnv guards on config.claudeCode?.systemEnv === false. Management API GET/PUT /api/claude-code exposes systemEnv. GUI ClaudeCode.tsx has toggle. Tests: 'injectSystemEnv skips disabled Claude and system environment integration'.

criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test pass with new test file
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/system-env.test.ts: 9 tests covering injection (macOS, non-macOS, disabled config, custom base URL, API key injection, shell quoting), revert (owned, ownership mismatch), stale cleanup (dead proxy). All pass: 9 pass / 0 fail / 26 expects.

criteria.scenario: tsc clean, bun test pass, gui build clean, docs build clean
criteria.capturedEvidence: tsc --noEmit: exit 0. bun test: 2173 pass / 0 fail / 9162 expects / 212 files. gui build: exit 0 (460.59 kB). docs-site build: exit 0 (55 pages). Commit 646aa07.
